AutomationReportSubmission.title: Automation Report Submission
AutomationReportSubmission.description: A record of a user's request and the generated automation report.

role.description: The job role provided by the user.

industry.description: The industry provided by the user.

tools.description: The tools provided by the user (optional).

repetitive_tasks.description: The most time-consuming task provided by the user (optional).

generated_report.description: The complete generated automation report object.

timestamp.description: The time the report was generated.

uid.description: The ID of the user who generated the report.

user_email.description: The email of the authenticated user.

user_name.description: The display name of the authenticated user.

user_id.description: The UID of the authenticated user (redundant with uid but requested).

/AI_Workflow_Architect/{submissionId}.description: Collection of all generated automation reports.
